title: Is your fishing vessel's lifting arrangement safe?
body: "Safety flyer issued with the investigation report into the fatal accident to a deckhand on board the beam trawler Cornishman (PZ 512), 44 nautical miles south-south-west of the Isles of Scilly, England on 6 February 2021.  The document summarises the circumstances of the accident and provides multiple safety considerations for members of the fishing community.  This information has been prepared for the:   fishing industry   Related publication  An investigation report has also been produced for this accident. "
